response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches 'Chocolate Tension' lyrics for the first segment. 2. Reference JSON lyrics are used for the song transcription; discarded unused portions. 3. Dialogue segment features Natsuiro Matsuri, Shishiro Botan, Kazama Iroha, and Vestia Zeta; names confirmed via audio. 4. Timestamps are precisely tied to vocal activation. 5. Sentence splits are applied at audio pauses for readability.

subtitles.original: きっとこの恋は少し甘くて
subtitles.english: Surely this love is a little sweet

subtitles.original: たまに苦くて割れてしまいそう
subtitles.english: Sometimes bitter and likely to break

subtitles.original: 不器用なハート壊して
subtitles.english: Breaking my clumsy heart

subtitles.original: チョコレートテンション
subtitles.english: Chocolate tension

subtitles.original: 冷たいミルクに溶かして
subtitles.english: If I melt it into cold milk

subtitles.original: いっそゴクンとしてしまえば
subtitles.english: And just swallow it whole

subtitles.original: 少しは良くなるかな
subtitles.english: Will it be a little better?

subtitles.original: この恋は少し深くて
subtitles.english: This love is a little deep

subtitles.original: たまに浅くてわかんないや
subtitles.english: Sometimes shallow and I don't get it

subtitles.original: 不確かな心理に迫って
subtitles.english: Approaching an uncertain state of mind

subtitles.original: 甘いシチュエーション
subtitles.english: Sweet situation

subtitles.original: 素敵な笑顔でぐしゃっと
subtitles.english: With a lovely smile, crush it

subtitles.original: 私だけにねえ笑ってよ
subtitles.english: Hey, smile only for me

subtitles.original: それだけでいいからさ
subtitles.english: That's all I need

subtitles.original: 甘い夢を見させて
subtitles.english: Let me dream a sweet dream

subtitles.original: 甘い夢を見させて
subtitles.english: Let me dream a sweet dream

subtitles.original: いいよー！見せてるよー！
subtitles.english: It's good! I'll show you!

subtitles.original: かわいいー！待ってるー！
subtitles.english: So cute! I'm waiting!

subtitles.original: かわいいー！うまい！
subtitles.english: So cute! You're good!

subtitles.original: かわいいねー！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: How cute! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 危ないよ！危ないよ！
subtitles.english: It's dangerous! It's dangerous!

subtitles.original: いいもの見せてもらった
subtitles.english: I got to see something great.

subtitles.original: かわいかったなー
subtitles.english: That was cute.

subtitles.original: すごいとこ来ちゃったなー
subtitles.english: We've come to a crazy place.

subtitles.original: 鼻血が出ると思ったです ちょっと興奮してきたな
subtitles.english: I thought I'd get a nosebleed. I'm getting excited.

subtitles.original: ちょっと興奮してきたからここで…
subtitles.english: I'm getting a bit excited, so right here...

subtitles.original: ぜぜぜ！王様ゲーム！
subtitles.english: Ze ze ze! The King's Game!

subtitles.original: 王様ゲーム？やったことないです！
subtitles.english: The King's Game? I've never played it!

subtitles.original: ガチで聞いてない！王様ゲーム？
subtitles.english: Seriously, I haven't heard this! King's Game?

subtitles.original: 確かに風真は急遽だから何も言ってないけど
subtitles.english: True, Kazama was a last-minute addition, so I didn't tell her.

subtitles.original: 王様ゲーム！誰も聞いてないし！
subtitles.english: King's Game! No one heard about this!

subtitles.original: ここにあの、王様ゲームできるものがありますので
subtitles.english: I have something here to play the King's Game with.

subtitles.original: みんなにはこれを一本ずつ引いてもらって
subtitles.english: I'll have everyone pull one of these each.

subtitles.original: 赤いものがついてたら王様になることができます
subtitles.english: If it has a red mark, you become the King.

subtitles.original: これまつが王様だったらライン越える？怖い怖い！
subtitles.english: If Matsu is the King, will she cross the line? Scary!

subtitles.original: 1から3まで数字があるんで、その指示をしてください
subtitles.english: There are numbers 1 to 3, so please give instructions.

subtitles.original: はい、じゃあ好きなもの。風真から引いていいよ
subtitles.english: Okay, pick one. Kazama, you can go first.

subtitles.original: これ？はい、じゃあゼータ
subtitles.english: This one? Okay, next Zeta.

subtitles.original: しょうがないな。これにしよう
subtitles.english: Oh well. I'll take this one.

subtitles.original: 王様だーれだ！ゼーーターー！
subtitles.english: Who is the King? It's Zeta!

subtitles.original: ゼータ王様だ！何でも言うこと聞くので
subtitles.english: Zeta is the King! We'll do whatever you say.

subtitles.original: この3人が数字を言って… ゼータなら安心できる
subtitles.english: The three of us will call out numbers... I feel safe with Zeta.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、1番と… 1番は2番に…
subtitles.english: Then, Number 1 and... Number 1 will...

subtitles.original: 1番は2番に、ほっぺちゅー！
subtitles.english: Number 1, give Number 2 a kiss on the cheek!

subtitles.original: なんで！？1番だーれだ！
subtitles.english: Why!? Who is Number 1!?

subtitles.original: ゼータ！？せっかく当たったからさ
subtitles.english: Zeta!? Because I finally won.

subtitles.original: 1番はどっち？1番はだれ？
subtitles.english: Which one is Number 1? Who is Number 1?

subtitles.original: 僕1番で！ぼたんちゃん2番で！
subtitles.english: I'm Number 1! And Botan-chan is Number 2!

subtitles.original: おおお！いただきます！いただきます！
subtitles.english: Ooh! I'll take that! I'll take that!

subtitles.original: ひえー！頑張れ！頑張れ！ほっぺにちゅー！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Good luck! Good luck! Kiss on the cheek!

subtitles.original: もうちょっとこの辺まで来てほしい。ちゅって言って
subtitles.english: I want you to come a bit closer here. Say 'chuu'.

subtitles.original: ちゅっ！あーー！何だこれ！
subtitles.english: Chu! Ahh! What is this!?

subtitles.original: うわーー！風真にはありと思います！
subtitles.english: Whoa! I think it works for Kazama!

subtitles.original: 笑っちゃう！大惨事だ！
subtitles.english: I can't stop laughing! It's a disaster!

subtitles.original: ダメージが凄そうだけど
subtitles.english: The damage looks high though.

subtitles.original: えー！代打できたばかりこんなことになってんだよ！
subtitles.english: Ehh! I just stood in as a sub and now this happens!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、風真。洗顔したから大丈夫。
subtitles.english: It's okay, Kazama. I washed my face, so it's fine.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、風真。風真が次で王様になればいいだけだから
subtitles.english: It's okay, Kazama. You just need to be the King next time.

subtitles.original: 確かに。王様だったら言うこと聞かなくていいんだよ
subtitles.english: True. If you're the King, you don't have to listen to anyone.

subtitles.original: でも王様側も難しいよね、これ。
subtitles.english: But being the King is also difficult, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 何ですかこれは. はいはいはい、どうぞ。
subtitles.english: What is this? Yes, yes, go ahead.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、右端. はい右端ね。
subtitles.english: Then, the far right. Okay, the far right.

subtitles.original: じゃあ風真一番左端. じゃあ私これ。
subtitles.english: Then Kazama the far left. I'll take this one.

subtitles.original: 行くよ、せーの！王様だーれだ！はーい！
subtitles.english: Here we go, ready! Who is the King? Me!

subtitles.original: おーゼーター！まつり様だ！
subtitles.english: Oh, Zeta! It's Matsuri-sama!

subtitles.original: どうしようかな？王様にもなれきるからね
subtitles.english: What should I do? Since I can really be a King.

subtitles.original: また3番が王様に. なるほど、そういうこと？
subtitles.english: Number 3 is the King again. I see, is that how it works?

subtitles.original: どうしようかな、本当に地獄にしよう。
subtitles.english: What to do... I'll really make it hell.

subtitles.original: 地獄！？頼むよマジで！
subtitles.english: Hell!? Please, seriously!

subtitles.original: 一番後輩だからな！やってやるよ！
subtitles.english: I'm the youngest! I'll do it!

subtitles.original: 3番の人が、0歳の生まれ… 生まれた時からの
subtitles.english: The person who is Number 3, starting from age 0...

subtitles.original: 一生をここに、こうやって語ってください
subtitles.english: tell the story of your entire life right here like this.
